title: Built to Last
author: Jim Collins
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Three tall vertical columns at the top, representing three different lifespans of companies. The longest one (the 'built to last' one) has a red marker at its peak. -->
  <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
    <!-- Column 1: short-lived (4-year company) -->
    <line x1="350" y1="200" x2="350" y2="700"/>
    <line x1="300" y1="700" x2="400" y2="700"/>
    <!-- Column 2: mid-life (50-year) -->
    <line x1="800" y1="200" x2="800" y2="1000"/>
    <line x1="750" y1="1000" x2="850" y2="1000"/>
    <!-- Column 3: built-to-last (200+ year company) -->
    <line x1="1250" y1="200" x2="1250" y2="1100"/>
    <line x1="1200" y1="1100" x2="1300" y2="1100"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Y-axis scale marks (left) -->
  <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c">
    <line x1="240" y1="700" x2="260" y2="700"/>
    <line x1="240" y1="500" x2="260" y2="500"/>
    <line x1="240" y1="300" x2="260" y2="300"/>
    <line x1="200" y1="700" x2="200" y2="200"/>
  </g>
  <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">
    <text x="180" y="704" text-anchor="end">4Y</text>
    <text x="180" y="504" text-anchor="end">15Y</text>
    <text x="180" y="304" text-anchor="end">100Y+</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Single red marker at the top of the longest column — a triangle flag -->
  <polygon points="1250,200 1310,180 1310,220" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  <text x="1330" y="200" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">ENDURING</text>
  <!-- X-axis line -->
  <line x1="200" y1="1150" x2="1400" y2="1150" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- X-axis labels -->
  <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">
    <text x="350" y="1190" text-anchor="middle">SHORT-LIVED</text>
    <text x="800" y="1190" text-anchor="middle">MID-LIFE</text>
    <text x="1250" y="1190" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ffffff">BUILT TO LAST</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Bottom annotation: the y-axis label -->
  <text x="80" y="200" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">LIFESPAN · YEARS</text>
  <!-- A 'now' line crossing the long column with a small red horizontal mark -->
  <line x1="1250" y1="600" x2="1300" y2="600" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="1310" y="604" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">NOW</text>
</svg>
rationale: A bar-chart comparison of company lifespans: a 4-year company, a 50-year company, and a 200+ year 'built to last' company. The third column pierces above the others with a single red triangular flag at its peak — the only chromatic element. The 380px uppercase title sits at center weight 500, 'BUILT / TO LAST' stacked over the chart. The chart's left axis is labeled in years; the third column is the only one labeled in white.
